class.name: MCPServer
class.brief_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for AI-assisted development.
class.description: MCPServer implements the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0) allowing AI tools like Claude Code to connect to and control the Godot editor. It supports both WebSocket and stdio transports. The server exposes tools for scene manipulation, script editing, project management, and more through the MCP tools interface.

method.name: start_websocket
method.description: Starts the MCP server in WebSocket mode on the specified port.

method.name: start_stdio
method.description: Starts the MCP server in stdio mode, reading from stdin and writing to stdout.

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops the MCP server and disconnects all clients.

method.name: poll
method.description: Polls the server for incoming messages. Called automatically when running as an editor plugin.

method.name: is_running
method.description: Returns whether the MCP server is currently running.

method.name: register_tool
method.description: Registers a custom tool that can be called by MCP clients. The handler callable should accept a Dictionary of arguments and return a Dictionary result.

method.name: get_tool_list
method.description: Returns an array of dictionaries describing all registered tools.
